creator: bsduck@mailo.com
text:
Reopening - this is not fixed nor overcome by events.

Following your suggestion, I had set in ~/.xinitrc the XCURSOR_PATH. This workaround works fine... but it's still a workaround.

I just upgraded to LXQt 2.1.0 and tried removing the workaround - it is still needed, so someone installing LXQt on FreeBSD will still get mismatched cursors.
